news.title:
Alkem's Baddi facility received EU GMP compliance certificate valid for 3 years.
Inspection conducted by German Health Authority from 4-10 Nov 2025.
news.summary:
Alkem's Baddi facility received EU GMP compliance certificate valid for 3 years.
Inspection conducted by German Health Authority from 4-10 Nov 2025.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories to acquire 51-55% stake in Swiss firm Occlutech.
Acquisition, under SEBI regulations, finalized on March 6, 2026.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories to acquire 51-55% stake in Swiss firm Occlutech.
Acquisition, under SEBI regulations, finalized on March 6, 2026.

news.title:
Alkem Labs shared a video of its Investor Meet on strategic plans.
Recording is accessible on their website under 'Investor Meet' section.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs shared a video of its Investor Meet on strategic plans.
Recording is accessible on their website under 'Investor Meet' section.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories executed a block trade of ~110,055 shares at Rs. 5455.50.
The transaction totaled Rs. 60.04 crores on the NSE.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories executed a block trade of ~110,055 shares at Rs. 5455.50.
The transaction totaled Rs. 60.04 crores on the NSE.

news.title:
Alkem MedTech targets the $680B global MedTech market, focusing on Orthopedic and Cardiovascular segments.
Plans CE & CIS approvals by FY28, aiming for 50% quarterly implant growth under experienced leadership.
news.summary:
Alkem MedTech targets the $680B global MedTech market, focusing on Orthopedic and Cardiovascular segments.
Plans CE & CIS approvals by FY28, aiming for 50% quarterly implant growth under experienced leadership.

news.title:
USFDA completed PAI at Alkem's Pune facility on Feb 13, 2026.
Form 483 issued with 6 observations; no data integrity issues identified.
news.summary:
USFDA completed PAI at Alkem's Pune facility on Feb 13, 2026.
Form 483 issued with 6 observations; no data integrity issues identified.

news.title:
Alkem Lab's Enzene gets 6 USFDA observations; no data integrity issues.
Alkem's Q3 FY26 net profit rose 2% YoY; shares up 1.4%, trading at Rs 5,475.85.
news.summary:
Alkem Lab's Enzene gets 6 USFDA observations; no data integrity issues.
Alkem's Q3 FY26 net profit rose 2% YoY; shares up 1.4%, trading at Rs 5,475.85.

news.title:
USFDA completed a Pre-Approval Inspection at Alkem's subsidiary Enzene Biosciences.
Six procedural observations noted, none related to data integrity; responses are being prepared.
news.summary:
USFDA completed a Pre-Approval Inspection at Alkem's subsidiary Enzene Biosciences.
Six procedural observations noted, none related to data integrity; responses are being prepared.

news.title:
Alkem Labs fell over 5% despite a record ₹43 interim dividend and modest Q3 growth.
Company plans to acquire Occlutech for $180M; revenue rose 10.7% to ₹3,737 crore YoY.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs fell over 5% despite a record ₹43 interim dividend and modest Q3 growth.
Company plans to acquire Occlutech for $180M; revenue rose 10.7% to ₹3,737 crore YoY.

news.title:
Alkem Labs to acquire 51-55% of Occlutech for €180.7M by June 2026.
Occlutech specializes in cardiac implants; revenue projected at €49.4M in 2025.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs to acquire 51-55% of Occlutech for €180.7M by June 2026.
Occlutech specializes in cardiac implants; revenue projected at €49.4M in 2025.

news.title:
Alkem Labs to hold 51% in Saudi JV; Vitals Biotech replaces original partner.
Board approved JV amendment on Feb 13, 2026; partner's firm holds 49%.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs to hold 51% in Saudi JV; Vitals Biotech replaces original partner.
Board approved JV amendment on Feb 13, 2026; partner's firm holds 49%.

news.title:
Alkem amended Enzene's shareholder agreement; F Prime & ERVI invest Rs 261.63 cr via private placement.
Post investment, Alkem holds 88.99%, Eight Roads 5.42%, F Prime 1.87%, ERVI 0.71% in Enzene.
news.summary:
Alkem amended Enzene's shareholder agreement; F Prime & ERVI invest Rs 261.63 cr via private placement.
Post investment, Alkem holds 88.99%, Eight Roads 5.42%, F Prime 1.87%, ERVI 0.71% in Enzene.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Board declared Rs. 43 interim dividend per equity share, payable from March 6, 2026.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Board declared Rs. 43 interim dividend per equity share, payable from March 6, 2026.

news.title:
Alkem Labs' Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹8.3B from ₹7.6B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin dips slightly to 22.2% from 22.51% YoY.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs' Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹8.3B from ₹7.6B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin dips slightly to 22.2% from 22.51% YoY.

news.title: Alkem Labs declares a dividend of ₹43/share, benefiting shareholders.
news.summary: Alkem Labs declares a dividend of ₹43/share, benefiting shareholders.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories approves amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Adroit Biomed, with itself under a scheme of arrangement.
The merger aims to consolidate operations, reduce overheads, enhance efficiency, and unlock shareholder value, with no change in shareholding pattern.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories approves amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Adroit Biomed, with itself under a scheme of arrangement.
The merger aims to consolidate operations, reduce overheads, enhance efficiency, and unlock shareholder value, with no change in shareholding pattern.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories reschedules Q3FY26 and 9MFY26 results call to Feb 13, 2026, at 5 PM IST.
The call, hosted by Motilal Oswal, will feature CEO Dr. Vikas Gupta and CFO Nitin Agrawal.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories reschedules Q3FY26 and 9MFY26 results call to Feb 13, 2026, at 5 PM IST.
The call, hosted by Motilal Oswal, will feature CEO Dr. Vikas Gupta and CFO Nitin Agrawal.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories executed an NSE block trade for ~101,852 shares at Rs. 5,774.
The transaction was valued at Rs. 58.8 crores.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories executed an NSE block trade for ~101,852 shares at Rs. 5,774.

news.title:
Sun Pharma, Zydus Lifesciences, and Alkem Labs gain approval to produce generic Wegovy.
Zydus and Alkem receive nod for semaglutide for weight loss and diabetes treatment.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma, Zydus Lifesciences, and Alkem Labs gain approval to produce generic Wegovy.
Zydus and Alkem receive nod for semaglutide for weight loss and diabetes treatment.

news.title: Alkem Laboratories will review its Q3 financial results on February 13.
news.summary: Alkem Laboratories will review its Q3 financial results on February 13.
